# backend/ml/features/time_features.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T06:30:14Z

## Purpose
Time-series feature engineering utilities.

Functions here add calendar, lag, and rolling statistical features to a
pandas DataFrame. Designed to be composable — call each function independently
or chain them together before fitting a model.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import pandas
- from `_` import numpy

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `add_time_features(df, date_col)`: Add calendar and temporal features derived from a date column.
- `add_lag_features(df, target_col, lags)`: Add lag features for time-series forecasting.
- `add_rolling_features(df, target_col, windows)`: Add rolling mean and standard deviation features.
- `add_ewm_features(df, target_col, spans)`: Add exponentially weighted moving average features.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
